title: Cobblemon PocketSMP Badges
description: Custom Cobblemon Badges for the PocketSMP
body:
# Adds 20+ Custom Pokemon Badges to Minecraft
![PocketSMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ee9f6f29dd6e404b6fe98579b91d09d1d131dc.png)

## Cobblemon PocketSMP Badges
- PocketBadges adds 20+ pokemon themed minecraft cosmetic badges to your pokemon adventure
- This mod was originally made for the PocketSMP cobblemon server but is free for use by all

## Use Code (SEBSTYN) For 25% OFF [BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/Sebstyn)
![BISECT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d1ffe3fb07ff4acb375efbba7c5f0e14993ba6_0.webp)
